title: Refund Policy
content:
Policy Overview


Refunds are handled strictly according to the policy below. Agents should not promise exceptions — emergency situations are reviewed case-by-case by the Lead, not by front-line agents. Your role is to document the request, set expectations, and escalate if needed.



Cancellation Policy


We require 24 hours' notice for all session cancellations. Sessions cancelled with less than 24 hours' notice are charged at the full session rate. This protects our tutors' time and allows cancelled slots to be offered to other students.


Emergencies: Sudden illness, family emergencies, and unforeseen circumstances are reviewed case-by-case by the Lead. If a client reports an emergency, do not promise a refund or credit. Document the situation in a ticket and escalate.



Refund Eligibility — What to Check


A client is eligible for a refund only if all of the following are true:


  • The request is made within 72 hours (3 days) of purchase.
  • No sessions have been booked.
  • No package credits have been used.

If eligible, the refund is subject to a 10% administrative fee. The client receives 90% of the purchase price back.



When Refunds Are Not Available


Refunds are not issued when:


  • More than 72 hours have passed since purchase.
  • Any session from the package has been booked — even if not yet completed.
  • Any credits or hours have been used.

After 72 hours, all sales are final. Unused credits remain valid for six months and can be applied to any available subject or tutor. Agents should position this as a positive — the client hasn't lost their investment, they still have tutoring credit.



Agent Procedure — Handling a Refund Request


  1. Verify identity using standard security checks.
  2. Check eligibility: When did they purchase? Have any sessions been booked? Have any credits been used? You can verify this in User Lookup by checking their package balances and session history.
  3. If eligible: Create a ticket under the Billing category with the subject line including the client email and "Refund Request." Document the purchase date, package type, and confirmation that no sessions were booked or credits used. Inform the client that refunds are processed within 5–10 business days and the Lead will follow up via email.
  4. If not eligible: Explain clearly why — the 72-hour window has passed, or sessions were already booked. Emphasize that their credits remain valid for six months and can be used with any tutor. Do not argue. If the client insists, create a ticket and escalate to the Lead — but set expectations that the policy is firm.
  5. Emergency claims: Document, create a ticket, escalate. Do not make judgment calls on what qualifies as an emergency.


Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "I understand this is frustrating. Let me look at your account and see what options are available."
  • "Your package credits are still valid for six months and can be used with any tutor on the platform."
  • "I'll document your request and our team will follow up within 24 hours."
  • "Our refund policy allows for a full refund within 72 hours of purchase if no sessions have been booked."
  • Never say "I'll give you a refund" — only the Lead authorizes refunds. Say "I'll submit your request for review."
